title: The Soldier Pushes the Plan
description: Pages 1–5 focus on the soldier pushes the plan, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the Toy Soldier pushes the rescue plan forward while the alliance tries to reach Sugar and expose Dressrosa's hidden system.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Stop Running!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The girl is showered with Jears...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Stop Running Away!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Rebecca is running back and forth!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: with rolling Logan after her...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The other fighters aiming for her...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...are getting mowed down one after the other!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's dirty, Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Stand up and fight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Fight, and spill your blood!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Stop Running, Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You member of that cursed family!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...you said that you're her father... so if that's true...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Then she's the grand- daughter of King Riku...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Which means, back when you were a human, you...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Remember something

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: It all began... on that night.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: That's not an answer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Hey- you... and King Riku's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: No, I suppose it began much earlier than that,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: ...with a woman named "monet".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: The day she started serving at the Royal Palace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: monet, is it...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: The bird woman of punk hazard!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: In these past 10 years, this country has really changed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: The land- scope... and the people as well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: You say you were attacked by Pirates!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Yeah, but the Riku Royal Army protected us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: This drought won't let up, yet our flowers refuse to wilt...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: It's all thanks to the fairies...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I wanna eat more!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: You must have had enough if you've got the energy to stamp and shout like that... even if it seems like we're poor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: The most important thing is that we're living in times of peace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: In the 800 years that the Riku family ruled...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: This country never once saw war.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: That's truly incredible-ble...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Indeed. That Royal family could be called a miracle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: But,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Suddenly, a night- mare...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: descended upon the palace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Who are you? Speak now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Don't raise your voice...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: And don't call for anyone....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: I'm Don- Quixote Dofla- Mingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: And I've returned home,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: As the rightful King of this land!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: ...Lately, I've been worried about a certain pirate named Donquixote.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: ...of course. Your fears were well- grounded. I am indeed a member of THAT Donquix- Ote clan...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: I've heard that you've been attack- ing ships transport-ing the "heavens' pay" tribute money from every country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: And that you used that to Coence the world government into making you a Shichibukai.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Fufufuffuffuffuffuf- Fuffuffuffufu!! They're con- Carned about how to deal with me...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Given that I don't fear the tenryubito, they're at a loss....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: If you know of my position and power, then this conversation should be over quickly...

summary: The Soldier Pushes the Plan focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the Toy Soldier pushes the rescue plan forward while the alliance tries to reach Sugar and expose Dressrosa's hidden system.
